name: ai-sailing
description: Weather-routing app voor zeilers: optimale route A naar B met wind, getijstroming en vaarbeperkingen

scripts.typecheck: for f in server/index.js server/config.js server/logger.js server/cache.js server/routeContext.js server/anthropic.js server/routing/*.js public/app.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
